notes.sg-vascular-disease-atherosclerotic-vasc: This is a specific type of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-arterial-disease: Arterial disease is a broad category, and 'atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease' is a more specific and relevant subtopic within cardiology.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-atherosclerotic-card: This is a core concept in cardiology related to vascular disease.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-secondary-prevention: Secondary prevention is a crucial aspect of managing vascular disease.
